title: Structured intronic RNA microdomains as candidate regulatory platforms: the C3 domain of TNF intron 1
author: Lopez-Neblina, Fernando
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the submitted manuscript, structural datasets, RNA secondary structure analyses, RNA tertiary modeling, TFBS analyses, RBP interaction analyses, and supplementary computational materials associated with this study: ‘Structured intronic RNA microdomains as candidate regulatory platforms: the C3 domain of TNF intron 1’.”
steps_raw: This repository contains the submitted manuscript, structural datasets, RNA secondary structure analyses, RNA tertiary modeling, TFBS analyses, RBP interaction analyses, and supplementary computational materials associated with this study: ‘Structured intronic RNA microdomains as candidate regulatory platforms: the C3 domain of TNF intron 1’.”
